snapshot.label.duplicate: A snapshot with this label already exists in the project.
snapshot.label.too_long: Snapshot label is too long (max 200 characters).
snapshot.access_denied: You do not have access to this snapshot.
snapshot.manifest.missing_keys: Snapshot manifest is missing required keys: {keys}.
snapshot.parquet.missing_entities: Snapshot has no entities to analyse.
snapshot.parquet.not_local: This storage backend cannot expose Parquet files to DuckDB yet. Switch STORAGE_BACKEND to 'local' or install the DuckDB httpfs extension.
snapshot.format.unsupported: One of the uploaded files uses a format that is not supported yet. Supported formats today: {supported}.
snapshot.conversion.failed: Could not convert the uploaded files into a snapshot: {reason}.
dashboard.scope.promote_admin_only: Only administrators can promote a dashboard to organisation scope.
dashboard.yaml.invalid: Dashboard spec is not valid YAML: {reason}.
dashboard.yaml.schema_violation: Dashboard spec does not match the expected schema: {reason}.
chart.auto.attribute_not_found: The attribute '{attribute}' was not found in category '{category}'.
filter.attribute.unknown: Filter attribute '{attribute}' is not present in this snapshot's schema.
import.csv.encoding_unknown: Could not detect the encoding of the uploaded file.
import.column.missing: The file is missing a required column: {column}.
export.no_rows: There is nothing to export — the query returned zero rows.
preset.access_denied: Only the preset owner can perform this action.
import.staging.not_found: Staged import not found or expired — please re-upload.
import.schema.mismatch: The uploaded file is not compatible with the snapshot schema.
integrity.project_mismatch: Snapshot does not belong to the supplied project.
integrity.empty_snapshot: Snapshot has no rows to analyse yet.
integrity.issue.high_null_pct: More than 30% of values are missing.
integrity.issue.constant: Column has only a single value across all rows.
integrity.issue.dtype_mismatch: Inferred type differs from the stored column dtype.
integrity.issue.high_zero_pct: More than 50% of numeric values are exactly zero.
integrity.issue.low_cardinality_string: String column with very few distinct values — consider categorising.
integrity.issue.uuid_like: Values look like UUIDs — usually not useful for filtering.
